title: rubus basalticarum
intro: Rubus basalticarum is a species of wild raspberry native to the Mediterranean region, specifically found in the island of Crete, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus basalticarum include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Rubus basalticarum fruits and leaves include their potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive system function. Rubus basalticarum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive disorders.
